info.title: CRMy API
info.description: The context backend for sales agents. MCP-native, PostgreSQL-backed, open source. All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <jwt-or-api-key>` except `/auth/register` and `/auth/login`.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication and API key management

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Contact records and lifecycle management

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: Account records and hierarchies

tags.name: Opportunities
tags.description: Pipeline and deal records

tags.name: Activities
tags.description: Logged interactions — calls, emails, meetings, tasks

tags.name: Use Cases
tags.description: Consumption-based workload tracking

tags.name: Briefing
tags.description: Single-call context assembly before any agent action

tags.name: Context
tags.description: Typed, versioned knowledge attached to any CRM object

tags.name: Assignments
tags.description: Structured handoffs between agents and humans

tags.name: HITL
tags.description: Human-in-the-loop approval workflows

tags.name: Actors
tags.description: First-class identity for humans and AI agents

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Outbound event notifications with retry tracking

tags.name: Emails
tags.description: Email drafting with optional HITL approval

tags.name: Custom Fields
tags.description: Per-tenant field definitions for any object type

tags.name: Notes
tags.description: Threaded notes on any CRM entity

tags.name: Workflows
tags.description: Event-driven automation

tags.name: Registries
tags.description: Activity type and context type registries

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Pipeline summaries, forecasts, and use case reports

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Append-only audit log

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Cross-entity full-text search

post.summary: Register a new user and tenant
Agent self-registration — idempotent, returns actor + bound API key

get.summary: List API keys for the current tenant

patch.summary: Update API key label, scopes, or expiry

get.summary: List and search contacts
Get a contact by ID
Get activity timeline for a contact
List and search accounts
Get account with contacts and open opportunities
List and search opportunities
Get an opportunity with recent activities

patch.summary: Update or advance stage. When body is only {stage, note?, lost_reason?} advances stage; otherwise patches fields.

get.summary: List and search activities
List and search use cases
Get a use case

patch.summary: Update or advance stage. When body is only {stage, note?} advances stage; otherwise patches fields.

post.summary: Update consumption for a use case
Set health score for a use case

get.summary: List contacts linked to a use case

post.summary: Link a contact to a use case

delete.summary: Unlink a contact from a use case

get.summary: Get activity timeline for a use case
List pending HITL requests
Check status of a HITL request

post.summary: Approve or reject a HITL request

get.summary: List actors (humans and agents)
Return the current actor identity (no scope required)
Get an actor by ID

patch.summary: Update actor scopes, active status, or display name

get.summary: List assignments
Get an assignment
List context entries
Full-text search across context entries
List context entries past their valid_until date
Get a context entry by ID

post.summary: Supersede a context entry with updated content
Mark a context entry as still accurate (bumps reviewed_at)

get.summary: Get a full briefing for a CRM object — record + activities + assignments + context + stale warnings
List webhook endpoints
Get a webhook endpoint (includes signing secret)
List delivery attempts for a webhook endpoint
Search emails

post.summary: Create/draft an email — auto-submits HITL request when require_approval is true

get.summary: Get an email by ID
List custom field definitions for an object type
List notes for a CRM object (object_type and object_id required)
Get a note with threaded replies

delete.summary: Delete a note and its replies

get.summary: List automation workflows
Get a workflow with 5 most recent runs
List execution history for a workflow
Pipeline summary grouped by stage, owner, or forecast category
Pipeline forecast for month, quarter, or year
Use case summary grouped by stage, product line, or owner
List registered activity types
List registered context types
Audit log — append-only event stream
Cross-entity full-text search across contacts, accounts, and opportunities
